name: Apple Cranberry Dessert-Using Mix
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooking apples (about 3 medium, peeled and sliced)
1 lb Can whole cranberry sauce (1- 2/3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cinnamon, and salt in an 8 by 8 by 2-inch baking dish.
2. Add orange juice, sliced apples, and cranberry sauce.
3. Mix lightly but thoroughly.
4. Bake in a 425°F oven for 15 minutes.
5. Make a well in the mixture.
6. Add milk and stir with a fork until all of the mix is moistened.
7. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto the hot apple-cranberry mixture.
8. Return to hot oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
9. Serve warm. Yield: 6 servings.
